text:
(In reply to Michele Possamai from comment #20)

From here:
https://github.com/saltstack/salt/pull/61240#issuecomment-970534051
--
The reason it's required even for python3.7 and greater is in order to bundle it in the thin tarball when salt-ssh connects to a machine with python3.6 or lower.
--
